title: Sweet Running
description:
Sweet Running - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game featuring five pretty and cute running girls in their daily lives after exercise. It's accompanied by relaxing music, and after completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, and 4x4.

- Press "F" while working on a puzzle to reveal a black and white image.

- Press the 'Space' key during gameplay to complete the puzzle.

- Players can use the A and D keys, left and right arrow keys, or left and right mouse buttons to quickly view the girls' pictures in the gallery.

* Puzzle image size: 800x960 px

* Gallery image size: 1088x960 px
